---
title: "Yu Zhou"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: ZhouYuFZU
      href: https://github.com/ZhouYuFZU
    - icon: geo-alt
      text: Fuzhou, China
      href: https://www.fzu.edu.cn/
    - icon: building
      text: Fuzhou University
      href: https://www.fzu.edu.cn/
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "#"
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: "#"
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:your.email@example.com"
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am Yu Zhou, based at Fuzhou University. This homepage collects my academic profile, research interests, publications, projects, and contact information.

My current work is connected to precision measurement, experimental data analysis, and engineering research. I am especially interested in reproducible workflows that connect experimental systems, data processing, and clear academic communication.

This page is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/). Please replace the placeholder links and text with your latest CV, publications, and research information.

## Research Interests

- Precision measurement and experimental data processing
- Engineering data analysis and visualization
- Reproducible research workflows
- Intelligent manufacturing and instrument-related applications

## Education and Experience

- Fuzhou University, Fuzhou, China
- Add your degree, school, department, advisor, and time period here
- Add visiting, internship, or research experience here

## News

- 2026-06: Personal academic homepage launched on GitHub Pages.
- Add recent publications, awards, presentations, or project updates here.

:::
